tuning: E A D G B E
content:
We can't go wrong
Cover Girls

[Intro]
[ch]A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
[ch]A[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]
For so long, I kept these feelings[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
for you locked up inside[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
And there were nights that I would[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
cry myself to sleep and wonder why[/tab]

[tab][ch]A[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]
Now I don't want to tell you how to live[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
Don't want to put the blame[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]
But don't you think it's time for you and I[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
To try to make a change[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]
We can't go wrong[/tab]
(Loving one another]

[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]

[tab]           [ch]A[/ch]
We can't go wrong[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
There was a time when things were[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
better than the way they are today[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]
But we forgot the vows we made and[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
love got lost along the way[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
Now I can tell just by the way you look at me that you feel the same[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
So don't you think it's time for you and I to try to make a change[/tab]

[tab][ch]A[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]
